Stop Conditions: Thermal limit, driver error, system instability
Pass Criteria: Workload completes with telemetry and no critical errors
Fail Criteria: Crash, GPU reset, repeated driver error

Stop Conditions: Thermal limit, repeated throttling, driver error, unresponsive system
Pass Criteria: Sustained load completes with stable telemetry
Fail Criteria: Crash, repeated throttling, GPU reset, unrecovered error

Stop Conditions: Unexpected OOM behavior, driver error, system instability
Pass Criteria: OOM point is documented and system recovers
Fail Criteria: System instability or unrecovered GPU/framework error

Workload: GPU workload plus approved CPU/storage load
Stop Conditions: Thermal limit, storage full, system instability
Pass Criteria: Mixed workload completes with logs and telemetry
Fail Criteria: Crash, data loss risk, severe performance collapse

Stop Conditions: Any safety, thermal, driver, or monitoring stop condition
Pass Criteria: Completes in approved lab setting with stable telemetry
Fail Criteria: Any critical instability or unavailable monitoring
